title: Summarizing a Scientific Research Paper with Keyword Extraction
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a summary of a scientific research paper with keyword extraction, where the paper is represented as a PDF file. The summary should include the most relevant keywords and their frequencies.
constraints: Must include a table with the most relevant keywords and their frequencies

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated summary adhere to the constraints of being under 250 words and including a table with the most relevant keywords and their frequencies?
Does the generated summary correctly identify the most relevant keywords and their frequencies?
Is the generated summary readable and well-formatted?
